calendar.matters:
For Court Review And To Confirm Mediated Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. THOMAS CAIN APPEARING FOR THE EXECUTORS;

ATTY. CAIN REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THE ESTATE CLOSED IN 2006. IN THE EARLY PART OF 2007, ONE OF THE BENEFICIARY FILED A MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT DUE TO IMPROPER NOTICE. THE NOTICE WAS MAILED TO THE WRONG ADDRESS AND WAS LATER ON APPEALED. AS PART OF THE APPEAL PROCESS THE PARTIES WENT TO MEDIATION AND CAME OUT WITH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PART OF THE SETTLEMENT CALLS FOR THE PAYMENT OF $15,000 IN ATTY'S FEE WHICH MR. CAIN BELIEVED TO BE NOT PROPER. THE COURT GRANTED THE PETITION TO APPROVE THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND TOOK THE ORDER UNDER SUBMISSION TO LOOK INTO THE ATTORNEY'S FEE ISSUE.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
